rationale: Review 1 has one decisive reuse finding confirmed by the diff: genuinely general lemmas such as `TauCeti.BialgHom.map_antipode` and tensor-product `map_id`/`map_comp` are declared `private`, so downstream TauCeti code cannot reuse them. Its other duplicate-specialization suggestions are less compelling because named base-change API lemmas can be useful, but exposing the general helpers would still make the resulting PR meaningfully better than an unconditional approve.
